topic: Why narcissists are so charming at first

script.title: Why Narcissists Feel Too Good To Be True

scenes.narration: The most dangerous people in your life will make you feel like the most important one.
scenes.image_prompt: A single wilted rose under a harsh spotlight on a velvet pedestal, black and white, film noir shadows, high contrast

scenes.narration: A narcissist doesn't approach you. They study you. They notice what makes you ache, what makes you glow, what makes you feel unseen.
scenes.image_prompt: An empty vintage armchair facing a cracked mirror in a dim room, pooled lamplight, black and white, film noir

scenes.narration: Then they become it. The perfect listener. The mind reader. The one person who finally gets you. You think you've found a soulmate.
scenes.image_prompt: A velvet glove resting on a silver platter, dust motes drifting through a beam of light, black and white, chiaroscuro lighting

scenes.narration: This is called idealization. Psychologists describe it as phase one of narcissistic bonding. Love bombing. A flood of attention, praise, and manufactured intimacy.
scenes.image_prompt: A broken wax seal bleeding onto parchment beside a quill, desaturated black and white, film noir lighting

scenes.narration: The warmth feels real, but it isn't for you. It's the reflection of yourself they've learned to mirror back, your own longing aimed back at you.
scenes.image_prompt: Two identical porcelain masks facing each other on a dusty table, one hairline cracked, black and white, deep film noir shadows

scenes.narration: That's why the early red flags feel impossible to trust. You aren't falling for a person. You're falling for a performance built around your weak spots.
scenes.image_prompt: A chess board with one overturned king, a single shadow of a hand reaching across the squares, black and white, dramatic high contrast

scenes.narration: Once you're hooked, the mask slips. The charm cools. The eyes go flat. Suddenly you're chasing a version of them that never actually existed.
scenes.image_prompt: A crumbling porcelain mask lying on a checkered marble floor, cracks spreading like veins, black and white, dramatic chiaroscuro lighting

scenes.narration: If someone feels too good to be true this fast, they usually are. Real love doesn't need to dazzle you. It just needs to stay.
scenes.image_prompt: An empty doorway with soft light spilling out into darkness, a single brass key left behind on the floor, black and white, film noir
